notes: Short abbreviated source columns (code, ref, status) that need to resolve against verbose target columns (order_code, reference_no, state). No exact matches, no aliases in the default table — the engine must lean on FuzzyNameScorer (prefix-match 'code'→'order_code', 'ref'→'reference_no') plus PatternTypeScorer if sample patterns help. 'status'→'state' is the hardest because neither samples nor name overlap cleanly. Expect this case to score low but not zero — it exercises the scorer pipeline's graceful degradation.
